name: Baseline UI
description: Quick UI cleanup — spacing, hierarchy, typography, and small layout fixes that remove AI interface slop.

install.cursor: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill baseline-ui -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill baseline-ui -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill baseline-ui -a codex -g -y
